title: Indagine urbinate: "Così l'algoritmo influenza il voto" - Il Resto del Carlino
snippet: The article discusses a study by Fabio Giglietto, a sociologist at the University of Urbino, published in early January 2026, on how social media algorithms can influence elections and democracy. Giglietto is quoted in the article, highlighting the asymmetric effect of Meta's policy on political content visibility. The study, 'A Pretty Blunt Approach: Meta's Political Content Reduction Policy and Italian Parliamentarians' Facebook Visibility,' analyzed over 2.5 million pieces of content on Meta platforms between 2021 and 2025.
description: An article from Il Resto del Carlino discusses Fabio Giglietto's study from the University of Urbino on how social media algorithms influence elections and democracy, quoting him on Meta's content reduction policy.

title: CS2Italy2026 - The Italian Conference On Computational Social Science
snippet: Fabio Giglietto is listed as a member of the Program Committee for the CS2Italy2026 conference, which took place from May 19-21, 2026.
description: Fabio Giglietto is listed as a Program Committee member for CS2Italy2026, the Italian Conference on Computational Social Science. This demonstrates his active involvement and expertise in a core academic field.
